title: BEM-675 verify RU hourly
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return None
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {'parse_error':True,'raw':p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:2000]}

def read(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''

state=load('governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json')
runtime=read('governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md')
delivery=read('governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_delivery.md')
status_file=read('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/curator_hourly_report_ru_compact_once.status')
processed=list(Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed').glob('*curator_hourly_report_ru_compact_once*')) if Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed').exists() else []
active=list(Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').glob('*.json')) if Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').exists() else []
ru='ЧАСОВОЙ ОТЧЁТ' in runtime and 'Наименование' in runtime and 'Краткая суть' in runtime
no_en='Write-channel' not in runtime and 'Role-bus' not in runtime and 'Readiness' not in runtime and 'runner restored' not in runtime
compact='№ | Наименование | Краткая суть' in runtime and len(max(runtime.splitlines(), key=len)) <= 80
sent=isinstance(state,dict) and state.get('telegram_delivery')=='sent'
layout_ok=isinstance(state,dict) and state.get('language')=='ru' and state.get('layout')=='compact_table'
checks=[
 {'name':'dispatch_status_204','pass':status_file.strip()=='204','evidence':'governance/workflow_dispatch_results/curator_hourly_report_ru_compact_once.status'},
 {'name':'queue_archived','pass':len(processed)>0,'evidence':'governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/'},
 {'name':'active_queue_empty','pass':len(active)==0,'evidence':'governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/'},
 {'name':'telegram_delivery_sent','pass':sent,'evidence':'governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json'},
 {'name':'russian_text','pass':ru,'evidence':'governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md'},
 {'name':'english_labels_removed','pass':no_en,'evidence':'governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md'},
 {'name':'compact_width','pass':compact,'evidence':'governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md'},
 {'name':'state_layout_ru_compact','pass':layout_ok,'evidence':'governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json'}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='ru_compact_hourly_delivered' if not failed else 'ru_compact_hourly_not_confirmed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'RU_COMPACT_HOURLY_NOT_CONFIRMED','failed':failed,'status_file':status_file,'active_queue':[str(x) for x in active],'processed':[str(x) for x in processed],'hourly_state':state,'runtime_preview':runtime[:1200],'delivery_report':delivery[:500]}
result={'schema_version':'ru_compact_hourly_delivery_verification.v1','bem':'BEM-675','status':status,'checks':checks,'hourly_state':state,'runtime_preview':runtime[:1200],'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 19:04 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem675_verify_ru_compact_hourly_delivery.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(result,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem675_verify_ru_compact_hourly_delivery.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-675 | Verify RU Compact Hourly Delivery | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 19:04 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem675_verify_ru_compact_hourly_delivery','cycle_id':'bem675-verify-ru-compact-hourly-delivery','source':'monitor','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 19:04 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem675_verify_ru_compact_hourly_delivery']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['operator_telegram_report_delivery_status']=status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 19:04 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem675_verify_ru_compact_hourly_delivery.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-675 '+status.upper()+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Verified Russian compact hourly report delivery, column width, language, queue archive, and Telegram sent state')
"""
No issue comments.
